irg.reason: Cannot run IRG meaningfully in this environment.
details: 1. Hardware: GPU not available (torch.cuda.is_available() == False). IRG requirements pin torch==2.2.1+cu121 and cupy-cuda12x==13.4.1 (CUDA-only build).

2. Repo status: The official repo (https://github.com/li-jiayu-ljy/irg) explicitly states 'the full code is not disclosed' due to commercial usage. Functions annotated with @placeholder do not implement what the paper describes, and 'some core parameters are not exposed'.
3. Comparison validity: Even if forced to run on CPU with a non-CUDA torch, the placeholder implementation would not produce results comparable to the IRG paper, making any benchmark misleading.
4. Dependency conflicts: numpy==1.22.4 and pandas==1.3.5 in IRG's requirements.txt conflict with sdv 1.36 / realtabformer 0.2.4 used elsewhere in this project (Python 3.10+, pandas 2.x).
next_actions_if_revisited: Provision GPU host with CUDA 12.1+ drivers.
Create dedicated isolated env (libs/irg/) with the pinned legacy stack.
Reach out to authors for the non-placeholder implementation (commercial license).
